EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriShapeType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Esri Shapefile shape types. Refer to the Esri Shapefile whitepaper for details. The ...General... types listed below are currently not public and not supported in shapefiles.

[Guid("8448500F-9284-11D1-B987-080009EE4E51")]
public enum esriShapeType

Fields

esriShapeGeneralMultiPatch = 54

54: New style three dimensional multipatch type - can have vertex identifier, normal, texture coordinates, and part material attributes.

esriShapeGeneralMultipoint = 53

53: New style two dimensional multipoint type - can have identifier (ID) attributes.

esriShapeGeneralPoint = 52

52: New style two dimensional point type - can have identifier (ID) attribute.

esriShapeGeneralPolygon = 51

51: New style two dimensional polygon type - can have non-linear segments and vertex identifier (ID) attributes.

esriShapeGeneralPolyline = 50

50: New style two dimensional polyline type - can have non-linear segments and vertex identifier (ID) attributes.

esriShapeMultiPatch = 32

32: Three dimensional multipatch.

esriShapeMultiPatchM = 31

31: Three dimensional multipatch with measures (Ms) on some or all vertices.

esriShapeMultipoint = 8

8: Collection of two dimensional points.

esriShapeMultipointM = 28

28: Collection of two dimensional points with measure (M) attributes.

esriShapeMultipointZ = 20

20: Collection of two dimensional points with height (Z) attributes.

esriShapeMultipointZM = 18

18: Collection of two dimensional points with measure (M) and height (Z) attributes.

esriShapeNull = 0

0: Empty shape and unknown type.

esriShapePoint = 1

1: Two dimensional point.

esriShapePointM = 21

21: Two dimensional point with a measure (M) attribute.

esriShapePointZ = 9

9: Two dimensional point with height (Z) attribute.

esriShapePointZM = 11

11: Two dimensional point with measure (M) and height (Z) attributes.

esriShapePolygon = 5

5: Two dimensional polygon with no attributes and all vertices connected by straight lines.

esriShapePolygonM = 25

25: Two dimensional polygon with measures (Ms) on some or all vertices.

esriShapePolygonZ = 19

19: Two dimensional polygon with heights (Zs) on all vertices.

esriShapePolygonZM = 15

15: Two dimensional polygon with measures (Ms) on some vertices and heights (Zs) on all vertices.

esriShapePolyline = 3

3: Two dimensional polyline with no attributes and all vertices connected by straight lines.

esriShapePolylineM = 23

23: Two dimensional polyline with measures (Ms) on some or all vertices.

esriShapePolylineZ = 10

10: Two dimensional polyline with heights (Zs) on all vertices.

esriShapePolylineZM = 13

13: Two dimensional polyline with measures (Ms) on some or all vertices and heights (Zs) on all vertices.

esriShapeTypeLast = 55

55:
